title: malaxis bicornis
intro: Malaxis bicornis, also known as the two-horned malaxis or two-horned orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Malaxis genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The Malaxis bicornis plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Malaxis bicornis can be made by drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves, which can then be used as teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
